seoDescription: Dr. Rohan Yashraj Gupta — the AI Actuary. Actuary (FIA, FIAI) × data scientist: selected works, research papers, and conference talks.

greeting: Welcome — I'm the docent for this gallery. Ask me about any piece, or about Rohan's work in general.
panelSubtitle: An AI guide to Rohan's work

honestMiss: That's outside what this gallery covers — I only speak to Rohan's work. Try asking about a piece, a paper, or a talk.

title: Claims Triage with LLMs
headlineResult: Cut manual claims review 40% at a top-5 insurer

children.text: A top-5 insurer's claims team reviewed every incoming claim by hand — a queue measured in days, with routine claims consuming the attention that complex ones needed. [Sample content: replace with the real case.]

Built an LLM triage layer that classifies claims by complexity and routes routine ones to fast-track review. The judgment call: keep humans on every decision, let the model only order the queue — auditability beat automation depth. [Sample content.]
Manual review effort down 40% within one quarter of rollout; fast-track accuracy held at 99%+ under monthly audit. [Sample content.]

title: Agentic AI for Actuaries
headlineResult: A practitioner framework for agentic AI in actuarial workflows

children.text: Actuarial teams adopt AI tooling faster than governance frameworks mature; the paper maps where agentic systems fit actuarial control cycles. [Sample abstract: replace with the real one.]
Published framework adopted as reading in two practitioner programs. [Sample content.]

title: AI-Driven Fraud Detection in Insurance
headlineResult: Keynote on production fraud models for 300+ actuaries

title: Reserving Automation Pipeline
headlineResult: Quarterly reserving cycle shortened from weeks to days
